notes: I've completely given up on Counterstrike 2 and uninstalled it. Proton Hotfix works for the graphical glitches that I encounter on the default Proton version, but I cannot get the server VAC validate my game no matter what I do. I finally just gave up and decided to not waste anymore time on this game.
